top_posts.text: I know it’s genuinely useful in computing but I cannot read “slurm” and not laugh

We had a new person come to the Kubernetes SIG Security meeting today and ask such great questions. What’s that mean? How does that work? Why is it this way? How does that get decided?

New contributors, don’t ever doubt yourselves. You bring such valuable perspective that makes open source better!

one of the weirdest things I've witnessed in my career is Michael Burry becoming an AI booster that also pretends to care about the economics. He actively (and nonsensically - Claude Cowork doesn't really work!) boosts Anthropic again and again and refuses to cover the actual economics side.

I caught up with Matt Klein, one of the famed developers behind the Envoy Proxy, and had a chat about AI and why the hype machine has gone too far. I think the industry is putting machines over people and the tradeoff leans too far in the rent seeker's favor.

The news is out. I was selected as the next KubeCon co-chair 🙌 I will be helping with the content for #KubeConNA26 #KubeConEU27 and #KubeConNA27 🙂

Thank you @cncf.io team for the trust and honor 🙌 and many many folks 🙂

Looking forward to this new adventure and let's keep Cloud Native Moving 💪🤟

Koordinator saves money. OpenFeature saves migration pain. Both are CNCF projects solving problems nobody else bothered to standardize.

Full deep dive:
podostack.com/p/dapr-karg... 🛠️

Now - OpenFeature. Different problem, same pattern: vendor lock-in.

Every feature flag tool has its own SDK. LaunchDarkly, Unleash, Flagsmith - switch vendors and rewrite everything.

OpenFeature: one API, any backend. CNCF standard.

For our second talk of the night, we have guests from JYSK - Khaled and Daniel. 🙂 

They are both platform engineers, who will share the story and progress of using Talos OS for Kubernetes clusters on the edge.

今日のAI関連記事

「Claude Cowork」一般提供開始　全社導入を支える管理機能も | ITmedia AI＋ 最新記事一覧
AnthropicがAIエージェント「Claude Cowork」の一般提供を開始。
企業内での安全かつ効率的な利用を支援するため、ロールベースのアクセス制御やグループごとの支出制限、利用状況分析などの管理機能を新たに導入しました。
これにより、企業はCoworkの導入・運用をより柔軟に管理できるようになります。
また、Zoom連携コネクタも追加され、OpenTelemetryのサポートによりセキュリティ強化も図られています。

CVE-2020-8562 exposes a TOCTOU race in Kubernetes API server proxy, enabling bypass of IP filters via DNS rebinding to access internal control plane services. Mitigations include DNS TTL enforcement and Konnectivity. #KubernetesVuln #TOCTOU #USA
